title: Nether Alloy Totem
body:
## **Added more Totems of Undying**

**Netherite Totem of Undying:** Upgraded from the Totem of Undying, reusable, enchantable.

![Netherite Totem of Undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32a4d9ecfcec62326c90ea4d09798bfc1c66e983.png)

**Iron Golem Totem:** Summons an Iron Golem when consumed to help you fight.

![Iron Golem Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f65d335e64befc5301d317122a568b9e5fe7b073.png)

**And some other totems.**

**Supports Curios API**
